description: The same Save/Load controller-focus fix, exercised in-game (the dialog is reused from the pause/settings menu during a battle). Opening it with a pad must trap focus inside the overlay (not the HUD behind it), let the D-pad drive the existing-saves ItemList (PadRouter's board handlers stay off it), and close on B — restoring the HUD's focus modes.

steps.script:
var d = tree.current_scene.save_load_dialog
return d._focus_confined and d._confined_controls.size() > 0

var d = tree.current_scene.save_load_dialog
var i = d._first_selectable_save_index()
d.saves_list.grab_focus()
d.saves_list.select(i)
d._on_save_selected(i)
return d.saves_list.get_selected_items()[0]
